lane_0_pressure.reason: R151 completed with PARTIAL due to infrastructure block; R151B is harness diagnosis with no dependency install allowed; static analysis only

root_jest_config.transform: ts-jest with useESM: true, tsconfig.module: ESNext

lane_2_root_ts_project_layout.critical_finding: Root has BOTH jest.config.cjs AND node_modules/ with jest binary. Root package.json scripts incorrectly 'cd backend && jest' but the jest binary and config are at repo root, NOT in backend/. This means tests can be run from repo root without any dependency install.

backend_source_structure.m01: backend/src/domain/m01/ - orchestrator.ts, orchestrator.test.ts, mod.ts, types.ts, context_envelope.ts, dag_planner.ts, deerflow_client.ts, intent_classifier.ts
backend_source_structure.m04: backend/src/domain/m04/ - coordinator.ts, coordinator.test.ts, coordinator_sandbox_integration.test.ts, lark_routing.test.ts, skill_router.test.ts, mod.ts, types.ts
backend_source_structure.m11: backend/src/domain/m11/ - executor_adapter.ts, executor_adapter.test.ts, lark_cli_adapter.ts, lark_cli_adapter.test.ts, sandbox.test.ts, mod.ts

lane_3_backend_project_layout.note: backend/ lacks all test infrastructure (package.json, jest.config.ts, node_modules) but contains the actual TypeScript source files and tests.

path_a_tests_use_jest_globals.m01_tests: describe/it/beforeEach/expect from @jest/globals — confirmed in orchestrator.test.ts imports
path_a_tests_use_jest_globals.conclusion: All Path A test files use standard Jest globals, compatible with root jest.config.cjs ts-jest ESM transform

vitest.conclusion: vitest exists but would require different invocation; jest is simpler given test files already use jest globals

ts_node_or_tsx.note: No ts-node or tsx found in root node_modules; even if present, would require test runner harness setup

esbuild_register.note: No esbuild-register found in root; alternative execution via node --loader would require significant setup

critical_constraint_check.npx_no_install_flag_used: npx --no-install should be used to query binary versions; no auto-install should be triggered

option_a_root_jest_direct.strategy: Run jest directly from repo root using root jest.config.cjs
pros: No dependency install needed (root node_modules already present)
Test files already use jest globals compatible with ts-jest
cons: backend/src domain test files need to be discoverable from repo root (they are via testMatch: ['**/*.test.ts'])
M11 tests excluded by testPathIgnorePatterns: ['/src/m11/'] — not an issue since R151 only targets M01/M04

option_b_fix_package_json_scripts.strategy: Fix root package.json test scripts to not 'cd backend'
option_b_fix_package_json_scripts.command: Would require editing package.json scripts to remove 'cd backend &&' prefix
pros: Would align scripts with actual jest location
cons: R151B spec prohibits dependency install but does not prohibit package.json edits
But R151B is a planning phase — not the execution phase
R151C (smoke) should not need package.json fix either if using direct binary invocation
option_b_fix_package_json_scripts.feasibility: MEDIUM (not needed if using direct binary path)

option_c_vitest_alternative.strategy: Use vitest instead of jest for running tests
pros: vitest is available in root node_modules
cons: Test files use jest globals (describe/it/expect), not vitest globals
vitest.config.ts include pattern differs from jest.config.cjs
Would require test file modification to be compatible
Not recommended for this use case

lane_5_harness_strategy_comparison.selected_harness_strategy: Option A — Root jest direct execution

lane_6_r151c_authorization_package.r151c_purpose: Run M01 orchestrator test from repo root using existing root jest infrastructure (no dependency install, no code modification)

env_setup_required.TAVILY_API_KEY: optional (M01 tests may not call Tavily; defer to smoke guard)
env_setup_required.NODE_OPTIONS: --experimental-vm-modules may be needed for ESM ts-jest

success_criteria.jest_runs_successfully: jest binary found and config loaded without error
success_criteria.ts_transform_works: ts-jest transform handles ESM TypeScript without error
success_criteria.m01_test_executed: orchestrator.test.ts runs (pass or fail is acceptable — infrastructure issue vs. test issue)
success_criteria.deerflowEnabled_false_path_tested: Test exercises deerflowEnabled=false local orchestration path
success_criteria.no_external_calls: No network calls to Python gateway, MiniMax API, or external MCP servers
success_criteria.python_gateway_not_called: true (test harness does not invoke gateway)

lane_6_r151c_authorization_package.fallback_if_blocked: If jest execution is blocked due to ESM/module issues, R151C should report specific error and fall back to vitest or manual ts-node investigation
lane_6_r151c_authorization_package.r151c_deliverable: Smoke execution report: did jest run, did ts transform work, was M01 test code exercised, were any external calls made

lane_7_r152_preliminary_authorization.r152_purpose: Validate M01→DeerFlowClient→Python gateway handoff; requires gateway to be running; healthCheck and createThread probe
lane_7_r152_preliminary_authorization.depends_on: R151C Path A smoke passes (at minimum, jest infrastructure works)
lane_7_r152_preliminary_authorization.note: R152 is deferred until R151C smoke confirms TS test infrastructure is functional

unknown_1.title: backend/src/domain/m11/ testPathIgnorePatterns exclusion
unknown_1.detail: Root jest.config.cjs has testPathIgnorePatterns: ['/src/m11/'] which excludes backend/src/domain/m11/ from jest test discovery. This is intentional ('Ignore old duplicate code Architecture 1.0') but means m11 tests (executor_adapter.test.ts, lark_cli_adapter.test.ts, sandbox.test.ts) cannot be run via root jest without removing this ignore pattern. R151C targets M01/M04 only, so this is not blocking. But if m11 tests are needed later, this ignore pattern must be addressed.
